dashboard.no_sessions_yet: No sessions yet. Start your first practice!

picture_naming.name: Picture naming
picture_naming.description: Look at the picture and say or write what it is

semantic_features.name: Semantic features
semantic_features.description: Describe the object before naming it
semantic_features.category_prompt: What category does it belong to?
semantic_features.properties_prompt: What does it look like? (color, shape, size)
semantic_features.associations_prompt: What do you associate it with?

phonological_cueing.name: Phonological cueing
phonological_cueing.description: Get sound clues to guess the word

category_sorting.name: Category sorting
category_sorting.description: Sort words into their correct category

generative_naming.name: Generative naming
generative_naming.description: Name as many words as you can from a category

word_matching.name: Word matching
word_matching.description: Match each word with its meaning
word_matching.match_definition: Match the word with its definition
word_matching.match_word: Match the definition with its word

sentence_completion.name: Sentence completion
sentence_completion.description: Complete the sentence with the right word

opposites_synonyms.name: Opposites and synonyms
opposites_synonyms.description: Find opposite words or words with similar meanings
opposites_synonyms.synonym_of: What word means the same as?

progress.title: Progress
progress.no_data: No data yet. Complete an exercise to see your progress!
progress.confirm_clear: Are you sure you want to clear all progress data?

onboarding.welcome_message: This app will help you practice language with simple and fun exercises. Let's set it up together.

about.title: About Habla Anomia
about.anomia_description: Anomia is a difficulty finding the right words when speaking. It is common after a stroke or brain injury. With practice and exercises, significant improvement is possible.
about.exercises_help: The exercises in this app are designed to help you practice language in a fun way, at your own pace and without pressure.
